response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical curiosity, and a track record of building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of designing enterprise-scale experimentation or growth platforms with AI-first telemetry, guardrails, or cross-team rollout systems — key requirements for the role.
strengths: Proven experience building scalable, distributed systems across multiple languages (TypeScript, DLang, C++)
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Demonstrated ability to lead cross-functional work and mentor through workshops and community engagement
concerns: No clear evidence of building or leading experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or growth measurement systems
Limited visibility into AI-driven engineering velocity or statistical analysis of experiments
Experience with telemetry and metrics is implied but not explicitly tied to enterprise-scale growth infrastructure
